description: Existing Danish laws, regulations, and policies related to digital identity, including eIDAS implementation, data protection, and cybersecurity. Used to ensure project compliance and identify opportunities for policy influence. Audience: Regulatory & Compliance Specialist.
steps_to_find: Search the official Danish government legislative portal (retsinformation.dk).
Contact Digitaliseringsstyrelsen for relevant policy documents.
Consult with legal counsel specializing in Danish digital law.
access_difficulty: Medium: Requires navigating government portals and potentially contacting government agencies.

document_name: Existing EU eIDAS Regulations and Standards
description: Existing EU regulations and standards related to electronic identification and trust services, including eIDAS and related implementing acts. Used to inform the EU Standards Engagement Strategy and ensure compliance with EU law. Audience: Regulatory & Compliance Specialist.
steps_to_find: Search the official EU legal database (EUR-Lex).
Consult with experts in EU digital law.
Review documents from the European Commission's Directorate-General for Communications Networks, Content and Technology (DG CONNECT).
access_difficulty: Easy: Publicly available on the EUR-Lex website.

description: Official procurement documents related to the AltID project, including requests for proposals (RFPs), technical specifications, and evaluation criteria. Used to identify opportunities to influence procurement decisions and promote platform neutrality. Audience: Policy & Public Affairs Coordinator.
steps_to_find: Contact Digitaliseringsstyrelsen to request access to AltID procurement documents.
Monitor the Danish government procurement portal for relevant announcements.
Consult with experts in Danish procurement law.
access_difficulty: Medium: Requires contacting government agencies and potentially submitting formal requests.

document_name: Participating Nations Digital Identity System Technical Specifications
description: Technical specifications and documentation for existing digital identity systems in other EU member states. Used to inform the technical feasibility studies and identify best practices for platform neutrality and fallback access. Audience: Technical Lead.
steps_to_find: Contact national eID scheme operators in other EU member states.
Search for publicly available technical documentation on national eID systems.
Review reports and publications from the eIDAS Large Scale Pilots.
access_difficulty: Medium: Requires contacting foreign government agencies and potentially navigating foreign language documentation.

description: Data on the Danish government's budget allocations for digital identity and related initiatives. Used to assess the financial landscape and identify potential funding opportunities. Audience: Policy & Public Affairs Coordinator.
steps_to_find: Search the official Danish government budget website (www.fm.dk).
Contact the Ministry of Finance for relevant budget information.
Review reports and publications from the Danish National Audit Office.
access_difficulty: Medium: Requires navigating government websites and potentially contacting government agencies.

description: The official national cybersecurity strategy of Denmark. Used to align the project's goals with national security priorities and identify opportunities for collaboration. Audience: Lead Researcher.
steps_to_find: Search the website of the Danish Centre for Cyber Security (CFCS).
Contact the CFCS for relevant policy documents.
Review reports and publications from the Danish Defence Intelligence Service (FE).
access_difficulty: Medium: Requires navigating government websites and potentially contacting government agencies.

document_name: Existing National Digital Identity System Architecture Documentation
description: Technical documentation describing the architecture of existing Danish digital identity systems, including MitID and NemID. Used to understand the current landscape and identify opportunities for integration or improvement. Audience: Technical Lead.
steps_to_find: Contact Digitaliseringsstyrelsen to request access to technical documentation.
Search for publicly available documentation on MitID and NemID.
Consult with experts in Danish digital identity systems.
access_difficulty: Hard: Requires contacting government agencies and potentially signing non-disclosure agreements.

document_name: Existing National Security Standards and Guidelines
description: Existing Danish security standards and guidelines, including those related to digital identity and cybersecurity. Used to ensure that the project's technical solutions meet national security requirements. Audience: Lead Researcher.
steps_to_find: Search the website of the Danish Centre for Cyber Security (CFCS).
Contact the CFCS for relevant security standards and guidelines.
Consult with experts in Danish cybersecurity.
access_difficulty: Medium: Requires navigating government websites and potentially contacting government agencies.

description: Existing Danish data protection policies and guidelines, including those related to GDPR compliance. Used to ensure that the project's technical solutions comply with data protection requirements. Audience: Regulatory & Compliance Specialist.
steps_to_find: Search the website of the Danish Data Protection Agency (Datatilsynet).
Contact the Datatilsynet for relevant policy documents.
Consult with experts in Danish data protection law.
access_difficulty: Medium: Requires navigating government websites and potentially contacting government agencies.
